caption: The video begins with a view of a hallway inside a well-lit house. The walls are painted a warm yellow, and the floor is covered with light-colored tiles that reflect the natural light coming from an open door at the end of the hallway. As the camera moves forward, it reveals a bedroom on the left side with a bed covered in a floral-patterned bedspread and a white bedside table. On the right side, there is a balcony with a black metal railing, allowing sunlight to stream into the space. The overall atmosphere is bright and inviting, suggesting a comfortable and cozy living environment. The camera continues to move steadily down the hallway, providing a clear and detailed view of the interior layout and decor.
